name: Astrotech Corporation
description: Astrotech Corporation operates as a science and technology development company in the United States. It operates through two segments, Astrodyne and 1st Detect. The company's products include the 1st Detect TRACER 1000, a mass spectrometer-based explosives trace detector used in airports and cargo facilities, and AgLAB, which develops mass spectrometers for the agriculture and cannabis markets. Formerly known as SPACEHAB, Inc., the company changed its name to Astrotech Corporation in 2009.
